facebook.caption: Tourists walk straight past this one. Nhà hàng hải sản Xưa và Nay sits on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo and the locals keep coming back for a reason. Fresh seafood, $15-30 a head, 4.5 stars across 193 reviews. That's not luck. Order the grilled squid and thank us later. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Grilled squid landing on the table at Nhà hàng hải sản Xưa và Nay. Fresh off the boat, priced for locals, rated 4.5 stars by 193 people who know Phu Quoc seafood. Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. Go.
